channel.title: Enterprise Reports on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise Reports on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Copilot usage metrics now include more of your active users
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics now use server-side telemetry in addition to client-side signals, so reports include more active users. The change affects enterprise usage reports and improves coverage of user activity.

  • Source: GitHub
